title: Verify supervision and crash recovery
description: Confirm a crashing process is restarted to a known state and that the restart strategy matches dependencies.
body: Steps: 1. Identify the child and its supervisor's strategy and restart/max_restarts settings. 2. In a test, start the tree with start_supervised! and kill the child (Process.exit(pid, :kill)). 3. Confirm the supervisor restarts it and the new process holds a clean init state. 4. Check the strategy: one_for_one for independent children, rest_for_one/one_for_all when a crash should also reset dependents. 5. Verify max_restarts is not so low it tears down the tree on a transient fault nor so high it masks a crash loop. Rollback point: before changing the strategy. Validation: the killed process is replaced, state is reset, and dependent children behave per the chosen strategy.
